CustomObject.description: Sector × Circuit litigation risk matrix derived from PermitTEC v0.1 Stage 13 analysis. Cells with ≥3 cases from the 761-case corpus. Used by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer V3 to add a sector-circuit composite term to the risk score. WinRatePct is the federal agency win rate (low win rate = higher risk).
CustomObject.label: NEPA Sector Circuit Risk

fields.description: Sector abbreviation matching Program.nepa_primary_sector__c (e.g., Energy, Transportation, Agriculture, PublicLands, Water, Military, Other).
fields.label: Sector Key

fields.description: Circuit abbreviation matching Program.nepa_circuit__c (e.g., 9th, DC, 10th, 4th). Combined with Sector_Key__c as the composite lookup key: Sector_Key__c + '|' + Circuit_Key__c.
fields.label: Circuit Key

fields.description: Computed composite lookup key: Sector_Key__c + '|' + Circuit_Key__c. Used as the Decision Matrix input column for BRE lookup. Example: 'Energy|4th'.
fields.label: Composite Key

fields.description: Federal agency win rate percentage for this sector-circuit cell from PermitTEC v0.1 Stage 13 matrix. Low value = high litigation risk. Used in SectorCircuitTerm formula: 0.20 × (1 - WinRate/100) × DataQualityWeight.
fields.label: Agency Win Rate (%)

fields.description: Number of PermitTEC v0.1 cases in this sector-circuit cell. Cells with <3 cases have data quality weight of 0.5 in scoring formula.
fields.label: Case Count

fields.description: Categorical risk label for this sector-circuit cell. HIGH = win rate <50%; MODERATE = 50–74%; LOW = ≥75%.
fields.label: Risk Cell Label

fields.description: Whether this sector-circuit risk cell is active in the scoring model.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Stage 16 federal-vs-state friction multiplier for this sector. Ratio of federal EIS median duration to California EIR median. 1.45x overall; higher for sectors requiring multi-agency coordination (Military 1.65x, Water/Coastal 1.47x). Used in the Challenge Prediction panel tooltip to explain sector-specific delay drivers.
fields.label: Federal Friction Multiplier

fields.description: Plain-language description of the federal-only requirements that produce the friction multiplier for this sector. Displayed as a tooltip in the Challenge Prediction panel. Example: Section 4(f); MPO conformity; Title VI requirements absent at state level.
fields.label: Friction Drivers
